description: Gisgraphy provides geocoding, reverse geocoding, address parsing, street search, full-text place search, and nearby search based on open geographic data. It is available as an open-source self-hosted framework and as hosted web services.
summary: Gisgraphy exposes one public developer integration surface: a REST/OpenAPI geocoding and geolocation webservices API, documented by an OpenAPI spec and using an `api_key` query parameter for premium access.
